name: Login Failures Followed By Success to the same Destination IP
notes: Reports multiple log in failures to a single host, followed by a successful log in to the host.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination match with the same Destination IP
conditions_text: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination match with the same Destination IP
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination match with the same Destination IP
TD_list: APPLY Login Failures Followed By Success to the same Destination IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after Authentication: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination match with the same Destination IP
RED_list: Event name: Login Failures Followed By Success to the same Destination IP
Event description: Detected several authentication failures to a single destination followed by a successful login.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
